base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of bowser_castle_variants — a tile from 1992 super mario kart. Bowser Castle 1-3 (asset IDs 6873/81333/81334) — lava-hazard tracks. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
